<p class="key-answer" data-question="Tegafur 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Tegafur</strong> 目前有 <strong>28 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Tegafur 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Teysuno is indicated in adults: - for the treatment of advanced gastric cancer when given in combination with cisplatin (see section 5.1). - as monotherapy or in combination with oxaliplatin or...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>colonic neoplasm（99.9%）</li>
<li>gastric carcinoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>cecum villous adenoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>cecum neuroendocrine tumor G1（99.8%）</li>
<li>lipoma of colon（99.8%）</li>
<li>cecal disease（99.8%）</li>
<li>colon leiomyoma（99.8%）</li>
<li>benign neoplasm of cecum（99.8%）</li>
<li>rectosigmoid junction neoplasm（99.8%）</li>
<li>colonic lymphangioma（99.8%）</li>
<li>cavernous hemangioma of colon（99.8%）</li>
<li>gastric linitis plastica（99.8%）</li>
<li>diffuse gastric adenocarcinoma（99.8%）</li>
<li>malignant gastric granular cell tumor（99.8%）</li>
<li>cardia cancer（99.8%）</li>
<li>gastric lymphoma（99.8%）</li>
<li>pylorus cancer（99.8%）</li>
<li>malignant gastric germ cell tumor（99.8%）</li>
<li>carcinoma in situ of gastric body（99.8%）</li>
<li>carcinoma in situ of gastric cardia（99.7%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>

</div>
